message_list_observation: Do not draft until the thread has been opened.
thread_observation: latest_inbound_messages must contain only messages after the user's latest outbound.
Old visible bubbles belong in visible_messages/background only.
stage_send_verification: Paste Chinese text into the input box; do not rely on direct Chinese typing.
Verify staged text exactly equals payload_text before send.
If input position drifts, exit and reopen the thread.
post_send_verification: Record succeeded only after a fresh screenshot shows the sent bubble.
known_gui_pitfalls: Input box position can change after full-screen input closes.
Re-locate the current input box before every click.
